close_reason: Committed KeyError fix for TSL epoch field
description:
## Problem

When loading cluster bootstrap data from object storage on restart, the code crashed with KeyError because it used dot notation (e.g., `bootstrap.parameters`) on maps where optional fields might not exist.

## Root Cause

FlatBuffers tables have optional fields. When decoded, missing fields aren't present in the map. Using `bootstrap.parameters` raises KeyError if `:parameters` key doesn't exist.

## Changes

### `lib/bedrock/control_plane/coordinator/server.ex`

`build_config_from_bootstrap/2`:
- Changed `if bootstrap.parameters do` → `case bootstrap[:parameters] do`
- Changed `bootstrap.parameters.X` → `params[:X]` using local variable
- Changed `if bootstrap.policies do` → `case bootstrap[:policies] do`
- Changed `bootstrap.policies.X` → `p[:X]` using local variable

`build_old_tsl_from_bootstrap/1`:
- Changed `bootstrap.logs` → `bootstrap[:logs] || []`
- Changed `log_info.id` → `log_info[:id]`
- Changed `log_info.shard_tags` → `log_info[:shard_tags]`

### `lib/bedrock/control_plane/coordinator/telemetry.ex`

`trace_director_launch/2`:
- Changed `old_transaction_system_layout.epoch` → `old_transaction_system_layout[:epoch]`

## Result

- Fresh start: Works ✓
- Reconnect: No longer crashes on bootstrap load, but still fails later in LogRecoveryPlanningPhase (separate issue - shard_tags problem tracked in parent task)

## Testing

```bash
# Fresh start - should pass
rm -rf $TMPDIR/bedrock_99999 $TMPDIR/bedrock_debug_cluster
mix run scripts/debug_cluster.exs --scenario=fresh --timeout=30000 --keep-alive=false

# Reconnect - no longer crashes on load, but still stalls in recovery
rm -rf $TMPDIR/bedrock_99999 $TMPDIR/bedrock_debug_cluster  
mix run scripts/debug_cluster.exs --scenario=reconnect --timeout=30000 --keep-alive=false
```
title: Fix KeyError crashes when loading bootstrap without optional fields
